delta: Recover PR67/PR75 component edge with C-089 bytes: exact pose/seg regression audit between stated cc1dfa PR67 and C-089 P6 stack
observed_public_signal: PR67 body reports older cc1dfa archive: pose 0.00048653 and seg 0.00060686 at 276741B; current release URL now downloads 86c869 archive at 276620B with same action size but smaller renderer/pose slices; C-089 exact is pose 0.00049601 seg 0.00061038 at 276342B.
required_gates: raw-output parity trace on C-089 vs stated PR67 archive
component trace delta localized by pair/frame
no release-SHA drift in source archive
T4 exact eval of any stack
why: C-089 is already 399 bytes smaller than the stated PR67 archive but scores about 0.000763 worse from components; sub-0.314 needs about 0.001471 total, so component recovery plus another ~1KB is plausible.

delta: PR75/P6 action stream dictionary-v2 or delta-varint grammar search over seg_tile_actions.bin
observed_public_signal: PR67 body/current release use 236 encoded bytes for 268 decoded SegNet tile-action bytes; C-089 P6 delta-varint uses 116 encoded bytes for 160 decoded action bytes.
required_gates: decode action records and prove non-noop runtime application
local raw parity/component proxy vs PR67 records
exact T4 eval for top 1-2 variants
why: C-089 action stream is 160B vs public stated 268B and current release likely changed again; only 116-268B direct rate remains, but action choices move SegNet/PoseNet more than their byte cost.

delta: Renderer QZS3 self-compression/learned bit-depth transplant without zeroing pose-sensitive frame1 head
observed_public_signal: QZS3 grouped qv/qbits loader in PR67; C-089 still carries 59,288B renderer slice after our P6 wrapper.
why: Renderer remains 59,288B encoded in C-089; public PR67/QZS3 model slices are around 56KB before decode, and self-compression/block-FP lanes target multi-KB savings. Need >2.2KB byte-equivalent for sub-0.314 if components hold.

delta: Henosis postfilter atom transplant as charged, typed postprocess stream, but only after strict no-op and component gates
observed_public_signal: PR65 archive x contains extra compressed post, shift, frac, frac2, frac3, bias, region, randmulti streams beyond mask/model/pose.
required_gates: port as opt-in runtime member with typed manifest
prove every selected atom changes raw output
why: PR65 has much better PoseNet body value (0.00035283) with worse SegNet/rate. Its post/shift/frac/bias/region/randmulti atoms are scorer-targeted pixel corrections; a small selected subset may improve pose enough to clear 0.314.

delta: Pose-stream active-subspace transfer: PR65 pose benefit without PR65 mask/SegNet tax
observed_public_signal: PR65 pose 0.00035283 vs C-089 0.00049601; PR64 velocity-only hurts, so this must be low-dimensional and component-gated, not drop-rotation wholesale.
why: PR65 pose distance is dramatically lower than C-089, but its SegNet is worse. A bounded QP1/low-dimensional pose perturbation can be <1KB and high leverage if it preserves SegNet.
